text: Measured JVM GC allocation at n=64/128 and optimized Scala.js construction/reuse counters. At n=128: GEMM 131134 B/op, add-scale 262288 B/op, QR fresh/reused 338388/264612 B/op, eigenvalues 141268 B/op, sparse map 7320 B/op, sparse matvec alloc/reuse 1104/0.008 B/op. Added AllocationArchitectureJmh, expanded JS runner, receipt with ranked leverage and explicit budgets. Verification: sbt benchCompile; sbt benchSmokeJSFull; focused JMH -prof gc runs.
